subcodes.first_line: O thou who art imprisoned in My path, and banished for My Name, and forbidden for love of Me! Hearken unto My call from afar [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المسجون فی سبیلی و المطرود لاسمی و الممنوع لحبی ان استمع ندائی من شطر
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @justice and wrath of God
